title: Build User Profile & Dynamic Routing
description: Create dynamic user profile routes driven by URL parameters, with safe data access and a Not Found fallback — standard pattern for any route-driven React app.
requirements: User list page with Link to each profile
Profile page reads userId from useParams
Fetch user details by ID from JSONPlaceholder or mock API
TypeScript types for route params and User model
Optional chaining and nullish coalescing for missing profile fields
Not Found page or inline UI for invalid userId
Loading and error states on profile fetch
Cart from Day 12 still accessible via Context on profile route
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /users/1 shows user 1 profile details
Navigating to /users/99999 shows Not Found UI
Direct URL paste loads correct profile (deep linking works)
Missing avatar field shows fallback — no runtime crash
Browser back button returns to user list
npm run build passes with strict TypeScript
hints: Parse userId to number; validate before fetch
404 from API maps to Not Found component
Reuse optional chaining patterns from Day 08 weather card

bonus.title: Routing polish
requirements: Redirect /users to user list index page

debuggingScenarios.title: Wrong route params
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Profile always shows same user or undefined userId
debuggingScenarios.cause: Hardcoded ID instead of useParams; wrong param name in route vs hook
debuggingScenarios.fix: Match :userId in route to useParams().userId exactly

debuggingScenarios.title: Navigation bugs
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Link goes to wrong route or full page reload
debuggingScenarios.cause: Using <a href> instead of React Router Link
debuggingScenarios.fix: Use Link or useNavigate for SPA navigation without reload

debuggingScenarios.title: Profile crash on missing field
debuggingScenarios.symptom: White screen when bio or avatar is null
debuggingScenarios.cause: Direct property access user.avatar.url without optional chaining
